ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {uuid: 12345})-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'programming'}),
    p2 = (q)-[:ASKED]->(u:User {uuid: 12345}),
    p3 = (q)-[:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {uuid: 67890})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How has the programming tag influenced the volume of accepted answers and engagement for the question asked by the user with ID 12345?

cypher:
MATCH (u:User {uuid: 12345})-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag)
WITH q, t
MATCH (q)-[:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer)<-[:PROVIDED]-(u)
WITH q, t, COUNT(a) AS acceptedAnswers, SUM(a.score) AS totalScore
RETURN q.title AS questionTitle, t.name AS tagName, acceptedAnswers, totalScore
